summary: Comprehensive testing of DocFlow field rendering and behavior fixes. All 6 issues verified: (1) Signature field has visible indigo-tinted background with 'Click to sign' text always visible, (2) Checkbox has DocuSign-style amber border + check mark + clear label, (3) Conditional logic bridges both Format A (conditionalRules on source) and Format B (conditionalLogic on target), (4) Radio Group NEW model with groupName/optionLabel/optionValue working - multiple fields with same groupName behave as single-select group, (5) Date format standardized to MM/DD/YYYY, (6) Date field auto-filled with signer's local today's date and read-only.
critical_code_review_comments: InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Fixed ESLint warning by adding onFieldsChange to useEffect dependency array (line 72)
Conditional logic implementation is comprehensive - supports both Format A (source-side conditionalRules) and Format B (target-side conditionalLogic)
Radio group NEW model correctly uses groupName for single-select behavior across multiple fields
Date field auto-fill uses formatLocalMMDDYYYY helper function and is read-only (rendered as div, not input)
Backend PDF overlay service correctly handles both radio models and formats dates to MM/DD/YYYY
seed_data_creation: Created test template with field placements via API: signature, date, checkbox, 2 radio fields (same groupName), text field
context_for_next_testing_agent: DocFlow field rendering fixes verified. Test template ID: 5f8425c8-e067-4108-818e-cf76aaa30f6d. Public signing link generated for testing. All field types (signature, date, checkbox, radio NEW model, text) render correctly in signing view. Conditional logic implementation bridges both builder formats.

visual_builder.radio_group_new_model: VERIFIED - Properties panel shows Group Name, Option Label, Option Value inputs + 'Duplicate as another option in this group' button
visual_builder.date_field_properties: VERIFIED - Shows read-only auto-fill info panel explaining MM/DD/YYYY format

signing_view.signature_field: VERIFIED - Always-visible indigo-tinted background with 'Click to sign' text
signing_view.checkbox_field: VERIFIED - Prominent amber border + amber-tinted bg + clear check mark when checked
signing_view.date_field: VERIFIED - Auto-filled with today's local MM/DD/YYYY (04/18/2026), read-only with green checkmark icon
signing_view.radio_new_model: VERIFIED - Multiple radio fields sharing same groupName behave as single-select group
signing_view.conditional_logic: VERIFIED - Implementation bridges both Format A (conditionalRules) and Format B (conditionalLogic)

backend_pdf_overlay.radio_field: VERIFIED - _draw_radio_field handles both NEW groupName model and LEGACY radioOptions model
